body:
## Goal
Write a drum setup article for Aquiles Priester (Hangar, Primal Fear, André Matos band) similar to the Matt Greiner and Brann Dailor articles.

## Signal
GSC data (2026-06-19): query 'aquiles priester drum kit' — 13 impressions, 0 clicks, 0.00% CTR, pos 6.4. We rank on page 1 but get zero clicks → editorial content gap.

## Action
1. Create `src/data/albumArticles.js` entry for Aquiles Priester (or add to existing array) with signature album (e.g. Hangar's *The Bridge* or Primal Fear era setup)
2. Write detailed drum setup article covering: kit (Pearl Reference / Tama Starclassic), cymbals (Sabian endorser), heads, hardware, notable technique (blast beats, double-kick speed)
3. Route at `/articles/aquiles-priester-drum-setup`
4. Add Article + Person JSON-LD schema
5. Add to sitemap (priority 0.8)
6. Link from /drummer/aquiles-priester profile page

## Verify
- Page renders at /articles/aquiles-priester-drum-setup
- Article schema valid (Google Rich Results Test)
- Internal link from drummer profile
- LLM markdown file at /llms/articles/aquiles-priester-drum-setup.md

## Done when
PR merged, page live, linked from profile.
title: feat: Aquiles Priester drum setup article — GSC pos 6.4 / 0% CTR on 'aquiles priester drum kit'
